evals.name: symphony-repo-extraction
evals.prompt: Research the OpenAI Symphony reference implementation at https://github.com/openai/symphony — it's the Elixir project Risoluto is patterned after, so I want to know feature-by-feature where we align, where we've diverged, and what's in Symphony that isn't on our spine yet.
evals.expected_output: A per-target markdown file at research/openai-symphony.md containing a metadata block with commit SHA + repo health, spine-alignment section with one entry per mock-spine feature (legend code + evidence), target-novel features section with [NEW] entries, candidate flags section, coverage manifest, and a run-history row. INDEX.md also updated.

evals.name: aider-website-crawl
evals.prompt: Analyze the Aider project at https://aider.chat for feature alignment against the Risoluto spine. Follow links to /docs, /features, and any changelog you find. Aider is an interactive CLI rather than an orchestrator, so expect many Risoluto features to show as [R!] (Risoluto-only).
evals.expected_output: A per-target markdown file at research/aider-chat.md with website-crawl metadata (fetch date, pages visited), spine-alignment entries, [NEW] entries for interactive-CLI features not on our orchestrator-shaped spine, candidate flags, coverage manifest, and INDEX.md update.

evals.name: composio-refresh-run
evals.prompt: Refresh the ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator target — the upstream has shipped new changesets since the last run. I want to see the deltas recorded in ## Run history and the INDEX.md row updated in place, not rewritten.
evals.expected_output: research/composiohq-agent-orchestrator.md updated with a new row in ## Run history showing date + spine SHA + target SHA + delta (new [NEW] entries, [?] flips, etc.). INDEX.md target row updated in place; negative-space section recomputed. No prior rows destroyed.
